confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Trace annotations for categorized FR ids were not recognized
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Updated scripts/check-traceability.mjs to parse categorized ids such as FR-COMFORT-01 and regenerated traceability evidence.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Active change scope implied complete UI delivery
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Clarified add-comfort-score as a domain implementation slice and explicitly deferred day-card badges and weekend strip rendering to add-forecast integration.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Precipitation rationale scenario wording overstated both rationales
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Updated baseline and delta specs to require the worsened precipitation day's rationale to mention the worsened condition.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Undocumented exported emoji helper
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Removed rationaleHasEmoji from the production module API surface and kept emoji assertion local to tests.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: CI traceability freshness mode did not match generated report
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Changed CI traceability checks to use the same --pre-commit mode as the generated incremental report.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: CI OpenSpec step used unresolved unscoped executable
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Changed CI OpenSpec validation to use npx @fission-ai/openspec@latest validate --all --strict.

residualRisks: Forecast UI still needs to render comfort badges and weekend highlight in add-forecast before FR-COMFORT-04 and FR-COMFORT-05 are user-visible.
Global MVP trace warnings remain for capabilities that have not started yet.
